name: Festivo Public Holidays
tagline: Look up global and city-level public holidays
description: List public holidays and observances for a country and year, with optional month, day, and regional subdivision filters.

auth.hint: Create a Festivo account to get an API key and send it in the X-API-Key header (a legacy api_key query parameter is also accepted for backward compatibility).

tools.name: list_public_holidays
tools.description: List public holidays and observances for a country and year, with optional date and regional filters.

params.name: country
params.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code, such as GB or US.

params.name: year
params.description: Calendar year to list holidays for.

params.name: month
params.description: Month from 1 through 12 to narrow results.

params.name: day
params.description: Day of month to narrow results.

params.name: regions
params.description: ISO subdivision or city code, such as IT-MILAN, to filter to a specific region or city; requires a Builder plan or higher.
